name_en: LO℮w℮🌟 Soft Nappa Leather Flamenco Purse Bucket Bag. Features a ruffled design with key details like the signature knot on the side. The Bucket bag introduces a new size for daily use while retaining the series' graceful style. Stylish and versatile, it can be worn with the donut chain strap or slung over the shoulder with the leather strap. This version is made of soft Nappa leather. Can be worn on the shoulder, crossbody, or handheld* Removable and adjustable leather strap* Removable donut chain charm* Anagram embossed pebbled leather* Discreet magnetic closure* Suede lining, gold or silver foil stamping*(Matching metal chain extension leather shoulder strap)
